_comment: Claude Desktop's custom-connector UI requires HTTPS, so for this HTTP demo use the mcp-remote bridge instead. It runs locally, speaks HTTP to the server, and runs the full MCP OAuth flow itself (DCR + browser login) — caching the token in ~/.mcp-auth. No token to paste. --allow-http is required because the server is plain HTTP on a .test host (not localhost). Needs Node.js (npx).
